page.title: Quick actions
page.subtitle: One-click AI actions after coding. Triggered from the lightning bolt icon in the chat header. AI completes them autonomously end-to-end.

createPr.label: Create PR
createPr.prompt: Create a Pull Request for the current branch

builtin.title: Built-in actions
builtin.description: Ready-to-use Git workflow actions. You can edit the prompt or toggle them on or off.

custom.title: Custom actions
custom.description: Add your own shortcut prompts — clicking sends them directly to the AI.
custom.empty: No custom actions yet. Add your first one below.

modal.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Generate unit tests for the current code changes
modal.promptHint: When clicked, this prompt is sent directly to the AI, which completes it autonomously.
